introSection: Grover's Alpine Express is a kiddie roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA. The attraction opened on April 3, 2009 as part of a new kids area called Sesame Street Forest of Fun. It was the first Force 190 installation from Zierer.
fullText: Grover's Alpine Express is a kiddie roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA. The attraction opened on April 3, 2009 as part of a new kids area called Sesame Street Forest of Fun. It was the first Force 190 installation from Zierer.
